message:
fix(search): report effective mode instead of canonical mode in results

Fix search result metadata to report the actual execution mode rather
than the user-requested mode:

- When a user requests "hybrid" mode but semantic search is unavailable,
  the search falls back to "lexical" mode. Previously, the result's
  `mode` field still reported "hybrid" (from canonical.mode), masking
  the fallback. Now it correctly reports "lexical" (from effective_mode)
- Update test assertion to verify mode field matches effective_mode
- Add explicit assertion: assert_eq!(json["mode"], "lexical")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
